focus100.name: 1-100 Focus Challenge
focus100.description: A Schulte-grid variant for attention and visual search training.
focus100.title: 1-100 Focus Challenge
focus100.subtitle: Search numbers in randomized segmented cells to train visual scan and sustained focus.
focus100.descBright: Bright mode: full board visible, ideal for fast warm-up and visual scanning.
focus100.descDark: Dark mode: flashlight visibility follows pointer movement for precise targeting.
focus100.ready: Ready to start. Find number 1 first.
focus100.msgStartBright: Bright training started: find numbers from 1 to {n} in order.
focus100.msgStartDark: Dark training started: move the spotlight and find numbers from 1 to {n}.
focus100.msgCorrect: Correct. Keep moving to the next target.
focus100.msgWrong: Wrong click. Keep searching for target {value}.
focus100.successSubtitle: You just finished a high-focus training round
focus100.successLinePerfect: Near-zero deviation. Your focus control is exceptional.
focus100.successLineGreat: Great rhythm and stable concentration throughout.
focus100.successLineGood: Strong finish. Keep practicing for sharper consistency.
focus100.sidebarIntro: 1-100 focus training is a Schulte-grid variant. Sequential search in shuffled numbers improves visual sensitivity and sustained attention.
focus100.sidebarMethod1: Set range N, generate random 1-N numbers, then start timing.
focus100.sidebarMethod2: Find numbers in order from 1 while minimizing large eye jumps.
focus100.sidebarMethod3: Record total completion time and compare with your best result.
focus100.sidebarTip1: Practice 2-3 rounds daily and track your trend over time.
focus100.sidebarTip2: Train in a quiet and well-lit space to reduce distraction.
focus100.sidebarTip3: Take a few deep breaths before each round to enter focus quickly.
focus100.sidebarEffect: Consistent practice improves attention span and stability, with positive impact on reading speed, memory efficiency, and anti-distraction ability.

ventWall.name: Vent Wall
ventWall.description: Drop a quick vent and read what break buddies share.
ventWall.title: Vent Wall
ventWall.subtitle: Post a short vent and browse voices from fellow buddies.
ventWall.placeholder: What do you want to vent about today?
ventWall.empty: No vents yet. Be the first one.
ventWall.noticeReady: Stay friendly and keep it civil.
ventWall.safetyTip: Avoid abusive, discriminatory, or illegal content
ventWall.errorTooLong: Content is too long. Please shorten it.
ventWall.errorIllegal: Content contains non-compliant phrases. Please edit it.
ventWall.errorRepeat: Repeated spam-like content detected. Please revise it.
ventWall.errorSubmit: Post failed. Please try again later.
prompts: Too many meetings today. My brain is overloaded.
Requirements changed again. Taking a deep breath.
Running on coffee. Hope this afternoon goes smooth.
Need a five-minute break before the next sprint.
